metadata.name: escrow
metadata.description: Atomic Swap Program for NFT/cNFT trading on Solana

instructions.name: atomic_swap_with_fee
docs: Execute an atomic swap with platform fee collection
This is the core instruction that executes a complete NFT/cNFT/SOL swap atomically.
All asset transfers and fee collection happen in a single transaction.
# Process
1. Validate swap parameters
2. Collect platform fee from taker
3. Transfer maker's NFTs to taker
4. Transfer taker's NFTs to maker
5. Transfer SOL between parties (if any)
6. Update treasury statistics
# Arguments
* `ctx` - Context containing all accounts needed for the swap
* `params` - Swap parameters including asset counts, SOL amounts, fee, and swap ID
# Returns
* `Result<()>` - Success or error
# Security
* Requires signatures from maker, taker, and platform authority
* Validates asset ownership before transfer
* Enforces fee collection before any asset transfers
* All-or-nothing execution (atomic)
# Errors
* `Unauthorized` - Platform authority signature missing or invalid
* `InvalidFee` - Fee is zero or exceeds maximum
* `TooManyAssets` - Asset count exceeds maximum per side
* `InvalidSwapId` - Swap ID exceeds maximum length
* `ArithmeticOverflow` - Fee calculation overflow

accounts.name: maker
docs: Maker (initiator of the swap)

accounts.name: taker
docs: Taker (accepter of the swap)

accounts.name: platform_authority
docs: Platform authority (must sign for fee validation)

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA (receives platform fees)

accounts.name: maker_nft_account
docs: Maker's NFT token account (optional - for NFT swaps)

accounts.name: taker_nft_destination
docs: Taker's destination for maker's NFT (optional)

accounts.name: taker_nft_account
docs: Taker's NFT token account (optional - for NFT swaps)

accounts.name: maker_nft_destination
docs: Maker's destination for taker's NFT (optional)

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Token program for SPL token transfers

accounts.name: system_program
docs: System program for SOL transfers

instructions.name: initialize_treasury
docs: Initialize the Treasury PDA (one-time setup per authority)
Creates a Treasury account that will track platform fees and swap statistics.
This must be called once by the platform authority before any swaps can be executed.
# Arguments
* `ctx` - Context containing authority and treasury accounts
# Returns
* `Result<()>` - Success or error

accounts.name: authority
docs: Platform authority that will control the treasury

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury PDA to initialize

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: Only platform authority can execute swaps

errors.name: InvalidFee
errors.msg: Invalid fee: Platform fee must be greater than zero

errors.name: FeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Invalid fee: Fee exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: MakerAssetOwnershipFailed
errors.msg: Invalid asset: Maker does not own the specified asset

errors.name: TakerAssetOwnershipFailed
errors.msg: Invalid asset: Taker does not own the specified asset

errors.name: InsufficientMakerBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance: Maker has insufficient balance

errors.name: InsufficientTakerBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance: Taker has insufficient balance

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid token account: Token account does not match expected mint

errors.name: InvalidMerkleProof
errors.msg: Invalid merkle proof: cNFT ownership verification failed

errors.name: TooManyAssets
errors.msg: Too many assets: Maximum number of assets per side exceeded

errors.name: InvalidSwapId
errors.msg: Invalid swap ID: Swap ID exceeds maximum length

fields.name: maker_sends_nft
docs: Whether maker is sending an NFT

fields.name: taker_sends_nft
docs: Whether taker is sending an NFT

fields.name: maker_sol_amount
docs: SOL amount maker is sending (in lamports)

fields.name: taker_sol_amount
docs: SOL amount taker is sending (in lamports)

fields.name: platform_fee
docs: Platform fee in lamports (paid by taker)

fields.name: swap_id
docs: Unique swap identifier for backend tracking (max 64 chars)

types.name: Treasury
docs: Treasury PDA account that tracks platform fees and swap statistics
Seeds: ["treasury", platform_authority.key()]

fields.name: authority
docs: Platform authority that controls the treasury

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Total platform fees collected (in lamports)

fields.name: total_swaps_executed
docs: Total number of successful swaps executed

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed for Treasury derivation
